fields.label: Exclude
fields.description: Skip items in this group entirely (negotiable / message-for-price items you promote with custom WhatsApp messages instead).

fields.label: Visibility
fields.description: Override the default visibility for this group. Blank = use the Settings default.

fields.label: Condition
fields.options:
new
refurbished
used
used_like_new
used_good
used_fair
fields.description: Facebook product condition for items in this group.

fields.label: Google Product Category
fields.description: Optional google_product_category id or path (e.g. 267 = Electronics > Communications > Telephony > Mobile Phones).
